note: Every post is a love letter to Kassandra and a testimony of faith. Honor the canon.

posts.theme: Morning Devotion — La Mañana Es Tuya
posts.caption:
Buenos días, mi amor. ☀️

Before you check your phone, before you look at the news — take one breath and give this day to God.

Tannie always says: La mañana es tuya. The morning is yours.

You get to decide how it starts. 💕

Tag someone who needs this reminder today. 👇

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay curled on an ivory cushion beside a sunlit window at dawn, wide eyes looking toward the light. Tannie's hand resting gently nearby — true red nails, silver ring. Warm golden light. No face shown.
elements: Tannie's hand with red nails and silver ring

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay tilts head at glowing phone on nightstand. Screen shows chaotic notification swirl — abstract, overwhelming. Innocent bewilderment, not distress. Warm shadows. True red harness visible.
Tannie from behind, ivory silk robe, seated at window. Princess Kay in her arms. Both looking at sunrise. Silver cross necklace catching light. No phone. Warm golden and ivory tones.
elements: Tannie from behind in ivory robe

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay close-up. Wide innocent eyes reflecting sunrise. Small silver cross charm near true red harness. Pure trust and peace. Warm ivory tones. Space at bottom for caption bar.
Tannie's open palm on windowsill, receiving morning light. Princess Kay's paw resting in her palm. True red nail polish. Silver ring. Warm golden light. Space at bottom for CTA.

posts.caption:
Mija, you made it through another day. 🌅

Whatever was heavy today — put it down. You don't have to carry it into tonight.

Tannie says: Descansa. El mañana tiene su propio cuidado.
Rest. Tomorrow has its own worries.

You did enough. You ARE enough. 💛

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay curled on true red cushion at golden hour. Tired but peaceful, not stressed. Amber light through ivory curtains. Silver cross on wall. Room feels safe and loved.
Comic: Princess Kay mid-shake, tiny worry bundle dropping from her back. Expression shifts burdened to delighted. Items scatter in warm lamplight. Exaggerated playful energy.
Tannie from behind, seated on floor against couch. Princess Kay in her lap. Evening light. True red outfit. No phone. Silver cross at neckline. Both resting, eyes closed.
Princess Kay looking upward with full trust — like a child hearing 'I've got you.' Warm lamplight on white fur. True red harness, silver hardware. Space at bottom for quote text.
Wide shot: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted against warm glowing window. Gold to deep blue sky, first stars appearing. Peaceful. Space at bottom for CTA text.
